Off Calendar Feb-28-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
James P. Nevin of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing on their own behalf.

RULING: BRAYTON PURCELL'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF MARGARITA BRANCH
No other appearances and tentative ruling adopted: Nancy Williams, Brayton Purcell's motion to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff Margarita Branch is granted. Brayton Purcell provided proper notice to Ms. Branch pursuant to CRC 3.1362 and the Court has received no opposition. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
